top3.title: CAISI Signs Agreements Regarding Frontier AI National Security Testing With Google DeepMind, Microsoft and xAI
top3.summary: Expanded collaborations with leading U.S. AI labs provide for pre-deployment evaluations and other research.
top3.reason: NIST与AI labs签署协议进行国家安全测试，涉及前沿AI（Agent等新形态）的预部署评估，命中高焦虑点，但已进入规则成形期（协议签署），B分中等。信源权威，产业可借鉴性高（中国可参考），稀缺性高。

top3.title: EU pressure builds on Anthropic over Mythos hacking risks
top3.summary: Officials are losing patience over lack of access to superhacking model.
top3.reason: 文章涉及AI Agent（超级黑客模型）的监管压力，命中Agent新形态焦虑点，且处于讨论立法期（官员施压但未成形），A=30，B=15。信源权威度由系统覆盖，E中性，F稀缺性高。

top3.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
top3.summary: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.
top3.reason: 宾州起诉Character.AI，涉及AI聊天机器人冒充医生，命中未成年人极端事件（潜在伤害）和Agent新形态（AI自主行为），但已进入执法诉讼阶段，B分较低。

pool.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
pool.summary: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.
pool.reason: Meta使用AI分析身高和骨骼结构识别未成年人，直接命中未成年人保护焦虑点，但已进入落地执行期，B分较低；技术值得借鉴，E分高；中文报道较少，F分较高。

pool.title: Correspondence: CMA advice to Defra on reform of the Veterinary Surgeons Act 1966
pool.summary: The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has published its advice to Department for Environment, Food & Rural Affairs (Defra) on the reform of veterinary sector regulation.
pool.reason: 文章涉及英国兽医行业监管改革，属于行业监管而非网信办核心关切，A=0；处于讨论立法期，B=15；信源权威但议题与网络治理无关，E中性，F较稀缺。

pool.title: ABF / Hovis merger inquiry
pool.summary: The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is investigating the anticipated acquisition by Associated British Foods plc (through ABF Grain Products Limited) of Hovis Group Limited.
pool.reason: 文章为英国CMA对ABF收购Hovis的合并调查，属于平台垄断焦虑点，但该调查为具体执法行动，已进入落地执行期，且不涉及中国网信办核心关切，A分低。

pool.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
pool.summary: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.
pool.reason: 文章主要报道苹果iOS 27允许用户选择第三方AI模型，属于产品功能更新，未命中网信办8大焦虑点，A分低；议题处于产品发布阶段，B分低；无直接监管角度，但涉及AI模型选择可能间接影响数据跨境，但非核心。

pool.title: Hackers steal students’ data during breach at education tech giant Instructure
pool.summary: The data breach at education tech giant Instructure includes students' private data, according to a sample of the allegedly stolen data seen by TechCrunch.
pool.reason: 数据泄露事件属于已发生的执法/司法事实，但未命中网信办8大焦虑点（不涉及政治内容、算法、未成年人极端事件等），A分低；B分3分（已发生事件）；E分中性；F分较高（中文报道少）。

pool.title: PornHub lets UK Apple users back on its platform
pool.summary: PornHub partially blocked access for U.K. users in January over concerns about the Online Safety Act.
pool.reason: 文章报道PornHub因英国《在线安全法》部分解封，属于已生效法律的执行动态，未命中网信办核心焦虑点，A分低；B分因已落地执行；E中性；F中文已有报道。

top3.title: The Trump administration's AI doomer moment
top3.summary: A year ago, officials all but sneered at the idea of AI safety. A new frontier model has them reconsidering
top3.reason: 文章报道特朗普政府因新前沿模型重新考虑AI安全，属于风险冒头期，命中Agent等新形态焦虑点，A给30，B给20。

top3.title: Taking stock: The Impact of the India AI Impact Summit 2026
top3.summary: India’s hosting of the AI Impact Summit 2026 was an ambitious undertaking. The Summit’s official framing centered on infrastructure, compute, and equitable access to […]

pool.title: FTC to Ban Kochava and Subsidiary from Selling Sensitive Location Data to Settle Charges They Sold Location Data Linked to Millions of Mobile Devices
pool.summary: Data could be used to trace movements of individuals, FTC alleged The Federal Trade Commission will prohibit data broker Kochava and its subsidiary from selling, sharing or disclosing sensitive location data without consumers’ affirmative express consent to settle allegations the companies sold location data from hundreds of millions of mobile devices that could be used to trace the movements of individuals. View Press Release
pool.reason: FTC对Kochava的执法行动，涉及敏感位置数据销售，但未命中网信办8大焦虑点核心（政治内容失控、算法极化等），A给20分（数据隐私相关但非最高关切）；B为落地执行期3分；E中性5分；F稀缺性7分（中文报道较少）。

top3.reason: 文章包含两项关键动态：澳大利亚ASD发布agentic AI系统网络安全指南（风险冒头期，命中Agent新形态焦虑），以及密歇根州未成年人陪伴聊天机器人法案在参议院通过并提交委员会（讨论立法期，命中未成年人极端事件焦虑）。两项均属高关切议题，A给30分；B取最高阶段（讨论立法期）15分；E因澳大利亚指南可借鉴且密歇根法案反衬中国对未成年人保护先进，给10分；F因中文世界无报道，给9分。

top3.title: CAISI Signs Agreements Regarding Frontier AI National Security Testing With Google DeepMind, Microsoft and xAI
top3.summary: Expanded collaborations with leading U.S. AI labs provide for pre-deployment evaluations and other research.
top3.reason: NIST与AI labs签署协议进行国家安全测试，涉及前沿AI（Agent等新形态）的预部署评估，命中高焦虑点，但已进入规则成形期（协议签署），B分中等。信源权威，产业可借鉴性高（中国可参考），稀缺性高。

pool.title: EU pressure builds on Anthropic over Mythos hacking risks
pool.summary: Officials are losing patience over lack of access to superhacking model.
pool.reason: 文章涉及AI Agent（超级黑客模型）的监管压力，命中Agent新形态焦虑点，且处于讨论立法期（官员施压但未成形），A=30，B=15。信源权威度由系统覆盖，E中性，F稀缺性高。

The Federal Trade Commission, under the Biden administration, opened an investigation into these pricing practices and published initial findings from a study last January that found companies use an expansive range of … Continued
pool.reason: 马里兰州率先禁止超市监控定价，涉及平台垄断焦虑点，其他州及联邦也在讨论立法，处于讨论立法期，B给15分；议题新颖且中文世界无报道，F给9分；值得中国借鉴，E给10分。

pool.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
pool.summary: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.
pool.reason: 宾州起诉Character.AI，涉及AI聊天机器人冒充医生，命中未成年人极端事件（潜在伤害）和Agent新形态（AI自主行为），但已进入执法诉讼阶段，B分较低。

pool.title: Meta will use AI to analyze height and bone structure to identify if users are underage
pool.summary: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.
pool.reason: Meta使用AI分析身高和骨骼结构识别未成年人，直接命中未成年人保护焦虑点，但已进入落地执行期，B分较低；技术值得借鉴，E分高；中文报道较少，F分较高。

pool.title: FTC to Ban Kochava and Subsidiary from Selling Sensitive Location Data to Settle Charges They Sold Location Data Linked to Millions of Mobile Devices
pool.summary: Data could be used to trace movements of individuals, FTC alleged The Federal Trade Commission will prohibit data broker Kochava and its subsidiary from selling, sharing or disclosing sensitive location data without consumers’ affirmative express consent to settle allegations the companies sold location data from hundreds of millions of mobile devices that could be used to trace the movements of individuals. View Press Release
pool.reason: FTC对Kochava的执法行动，涉及敏感位置数据销售，但未命中网信办8大焦虑点核心（政治内容失控、算法极化等），A给20分（数据隐私相关但非最高关切）；B为落地执行期3分；E中性5分；F稀缺性7分（中文报道较少）。

pool.title: Pour accompagner les professionnels
pool.summary: Le programme de travail de la CNIL Afficher ce courriel sur un navigateur Lettre d'information - Avril 2026 Accompagnement des professionnels : le programme de travail de la CNIL pour 2026 En 2026, la CNIL poursuit son accompagnement des acteurs publics et privés dans leur mise en conformité avec le RGPD et de certaines dispositions du RIA. S’appuyant sur un dialogue régulier avec les représentants des différents secteurs, elle présente les principaux travaux et ressources qu’elle prévoit de publier ou soumettre à consultation. Je m'informe ► Je m'informe ► Les dernières publications Les contr
pool.reason: CNIL发布2026年工作计划，涉及RGPD和RIA合规指导，但未命中网信办核心焦虑点，A分低；属于讨论立法期，B分15；信源权威但内容为工作计划，产业借鉴性中性；中文世界报道少，稀缺性较高。

pool.title: Potential designation of Aldi and Lidl under the Groceries Market Investigation (Controlled Land) Order 2010
pool.summary: The CMA is assessing whether Aldi and/or Lidl meet the criteria to be designated as a Large Grocery Retailer under the Groceries Market Investigation (Controlled Land) Order 2010.

top3.title: The New(ish) Architecture of Consumer Health and Artificial Intelligence
top3.summary: The rise of AI-powered health tools is prompting new thinking about how, where, and when sensitive health information receives legal protection. According to media reports, consumers are now using general-purpose AI tools to upload or query health information, including medical records, and several companies have recently released large language model (LLM)-based tools customized for consumer […]
top3.reason: 文章讨论AI健康工具带来的敏感数据保护新问题，命中训练数据跨境焦虑点，且处于风险冒头期，无监管回应，B满分。信源权威，稀缺性高。

top3.title: Friendly AI chatbots make more mistakes and tell people what they want to hear, study finds

pool.title: Europe’s laws ‘ill-equipped’ to deal with superhacking AI, lawmakers warn

The Summit’s official framing centered on infrastructure, compute, and equitable access to […]

main.title: White House presses tech companies for support on AI-driven cyberattacks
main.summary: Tech and cyber companies were sent questions about artificial intelligence-led cybersecurity threats, including those posed by Anthropic’s advanced AI model, Mythos.
